unicode-segmenter benchmark report

Grapheme segmentation, six workloads × six implementations. Longer bars are better (throughput). Generated 2026-07-07 from the records in this directory.

Latest comparison

Throughput per workload; unicode-segmenter highlighted against the alternatives. Hover or focus a row for exact numbers.

unicode-segmenter over time

Throughput of unicode-segmenter across archived records for the selected platform. Runtime versions vary between records; the tooltip shows each record's runtime.

Regenerate with node benchmark/grapheme/_records/report.mjs after adding a record. Sources: mitata outputs named YYYYMMDD-cpu-os-runtime.txt.
